title: Automations inaccessible due to being locked by admin
excerpt:

I discovered a problem on a particular board today.

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I discovered a problem on a particular board today.
I wanted to add a new automation, but the options are greyed out with the note “This integration has been locked by an admin”.
I reviewed the FAQ on why automations can be deactivated, but nothing seem to be the case for my case. I am also an admin on the overall account and all permissions (account, workspace, board levels) do not restrict this (as it also works for other boards in the same workspace.

Can somebody help me and tell me what I am doing wrong?

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml: Please note that I realized that this is only applicable for custom automations. Generic automations do work as expected.

posts.author: Philipp_Nies (Philipp Nies)
posts.cookedHtml:
SOLVED!

Custom automations are considered integrations (WHY?) and this permission setting has been disabled on the account.

Thanks.
Philipp
